title: astragalus perianus
intro: Astragalus perianus, also known as Perian Astragalus or Astragalus, is a plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which help to balance the body's response to stress and promote overall well-being. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, providing various health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus perianus can be consumed as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to create a synergistic effect in traditional Chinese medicine.
